What is the hostel facility like at Malla Reddy University?
Malla Reddy University provides world-class infrastructure for future leaders.
Are there any specific rules or timings for hostellers at MRU?
MRU has established guidelines and regulations for hostellers to ensure a comfortable stay.
Can international students also opt for hostel facility at MRU?
Yes, Malla Reddy University offers hostel facilities for international students as well.
What are the facilities available in the hostels?
World-class laboratories, libraries and computing facilities are available in the hostels.
How big is the campus?
The campus is spread over 100 acres of land.
What is the founder of MR University?
Shri. Ch Malla Reddy, the most humble dynamic and charismatic founder chairman.
How many institutions has MR University established?
32 Institutions including Malla Reddy Tech City and Malla Reddy Health City.
What is the leadership team behind Malla Reddy University?
The leadership team consists of Shri. Ch Mahender Reddy, Dr. Ch Bhadra Reddy, Smt. Ch Shalini Reddy, and Dr. Ch Preeti Reddy.
Who is the Pro-Chancellor of Malla Reddy University?
Smt. Ch. Shalini Reddy serves as the esteemed Pro-Chancellor of Malla Reddy University Hyderabad (MRUH).
What are the values that drive Smt. Chalini Reddy's leadership at MRUH?
She is dedicated to advancing quality education, innovation, and student development through her strong belief in holistic and inclusive education.
How does Smt. Shalini Reddy impact Malla Reddy University?
Her leadership is central to the rapid progress of MRUH as a growing multidisciplinary university known for its commitment to excellence.
What is the hostel policy at MR University?
The hostel policy at MR University emphasizes modern pedagogical practices and skill-based learning to ensure students graduate with strong competencies.
How do I get accommodation in the university hostel?
To get accommodation in the university hostel, you can apply through the university's online portal, providing all required documents and information as specified.
What are the facilities provided by MRUH Hostel?
The hostel provides state-of-the-art facilities, including Wi-Fi enabled rooms, laundry facilities, and a mess hall that serves a variety of cuisines.
Is there any security system in place for students at MRUH Hostel?
Yes, the hostel has a robust security system with CCTV cameras, round-the-clock security personnel, and strict entry-exit protocols to ensure student safety.
Can I choose my roommates at MRUH Hostel?
No, roommate selection is not available at MRUH Hostel. However, you can request for a specific roommate or floor if feasible.
What are the rules and regulations regarding internet usage in MRUH Hostel?
Internet usage is allowed for personal purposes only, and students must adhere to the university's acceptable use policy and ensure responsible internet behavior.
Are there any facilities for students with disabilities at MRUH Hostel?
Yes, MRUH Hostel has accessible rooms, ramps, and elevators to cater to students with mobility impairments, ensuring equal access to all facilities and services.
